prompt: SUBJECT: a horizontal ornamental garland strip for a vintage Chinese poster border, in the style of 1920s Shanghai advertising posters: a running vine of small peony blossoms in blush-pink and coral, green leaves, and tiny golden plum blossoms, flowing left to right as a long low band, roughly five times wider than tall, visually balanced so it can tile side by side. STYLE: hand-tinted chromolithograph engraving matching the attached voucher's illustration style - warm ochre-sepia linework, flat natural color washes, no photorealism. FRAMING (critical): the ENTIRE garland fully inside the frame with a wide empty margin of at least 12 percent on ALL four sides; nothing may touch or be cut off by any edge. GROUND: fully transparent background, nothing else; no text, no border lines, no shadow, no yellow or gold color cast.
